sqlMap.select: select * from vm_archives_update f where f.field0008 = #matterId#
select * from formmain_3374 f where f.field0008 = #matterId# and f.field0001 = #fildId#

select v.id as id, v.matter_id as matterId, v.next_submitted_date as nextSubmittedDate, v.next_task_date as nextTaskDate, v.submitted_rate as submittedRate, v.year_submitted_date as yearSubmittedDate, v.year_task_date as yearTaskDate, v.submitted_time_basic as submittedTimeBasic, v.submitted_time_number as submittedTimeNumber, v.submitted_time_unit as submittedTimeUnit, v.push_time_basic as pushTimeBasic, v.push_time_number as pushTimeNumber, v.push_time_unit as pushTimeUnit from vm_submitted_archives v where push_falg in ('3827536082177116572','1329538010751910982') and ispush = '-8120149130502781733' and isregular <> -7378876665094976280 and v.next_task_date is not null and to_date(v.next_task_date,'YYYYMMDDHH24:MISS') <= sysdate and not exists (select 1 from vm_submitted_process a where a.matter_id = v.matter_id and a.end_submitted_date = v.next_submitted_date)
select f.id as flowId, f.end_submitted_date as nextSubmittedDate, f.leader as leader, f.matter_title as matterTitle from vm_submitted_process f where f.finishedflag = 0 $sqlParam$

select f.leader as leader, to_char(count(f.leader)) as matterCount, to_char(wmsys.wm_concat('《'||matter_title||'》OAFLAG')) as title from vm_submitted_process f where f.end_submitted_date is not null and f.finishedflag = 0 $sqlParam$ group by f.leader
select count(1) from vm_submitted_process f where f.matter_id = #matterId# and f.end_submitted_date = #strSubmittedDate#
sqlMap.update: update vm_submitted_archives v set v.next_submitted_date = #nextSubmittedDate# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
update vm_report_archives v set v.modify_date = #modifyDate# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
update vm_report_archives v set v.next_report_date_this = #nextSubmittedDateThis# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
update vm_submitted_archives v set v.push_falg = #enumId# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
update vm_submitted_process f set f.matter_status = #enumId# where f.id = #id#
update vm_submitted_archives v set v.next_task_date = #nextTaskDate# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
update vm_report_archives v set v.next_task_date_this = #nextTaskDateThis# where v.matter_id = #matterId#
sqlMap.select: select v.matter_id as matterId, V.matter_title AS matterTitle, V.matter_desc AS matterDesc, V.submitted_object AS submittedObject, V.report_template AS reportTemplate, V.next_submitted_date AS nextSubmittedDate, V.other_contacts AS otherContacts, V.other_phone AS otherPhone, V.other_email AS otherEmail, V.submitted_platform AS submittedPlatform, V.submitted_mode AS submittedMode, V.submitted_explain AS submittedExplain, V.submitted_company AS submittedCompany, V.submitted_depart AS submittedDepart, V.leader AS leader, V.reviewer AS reviewer, V.co_leader AS coLeader, v.systems as systems, v.mail as mail, v.paper as paper, v.platform_id as platformId, V.object_id AS objectId, v.submitted_rate as reportRate, v.submitted_enclosure as reportEnclosure from vm_submitted_archives v where v.matter_id = #matterId#
select id from formmain_3366 c where c.field0003 = #specialId#
select id from vm_report_platform c where c.platform_id = #specialId#
select distinct(c.file_url) file_url from ctp_attachment c where c.sub_reference = #refId# and c.att_reference = #Id#
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getFirstWorkDayMonth(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getFirstWorkDayNextMonth(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getLastWorkDayMonth(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getLastWorkDayNextMonth(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getFirstWorkdaySeason(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getFirstWorkdayNextSeason(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getLastWorkdaySeason(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(util_common.getLastWorkdayNextSeason(#nowdate#),#submittedCount#) from dual
select util_common.isWorkDay(#date#) from dual
select util_common.getNextWorkDay(#date#,#count#) from dual
select '今日分管部门共有_allReportCount_个对外报送事项,其中按时完成_onReportCount_项,逾期补报完成_outReportCount_项,还有_noReportCount_项没有完成。' from dual
select '今日部门共有_allReportCount_个对外报送事项,其中按时完成_onReportCount_项,逾期补报完成_outReportCount_项,还有_noReportCount_项没有完成。' from dual
select '今日共有_allReportCount_个对外报送事项,其中按时完成_onReportCount_项,逾期补报完成_outReportCount_项,还有_noReportCount_项没有完成。' from dual

select f.id as flowId, f.end_submitted_date as nextSubmittedDate, f.leader as leader, f.matter_title as matterTitle from vm_submitted_process f where f.end_submitted_date is not null and f.finishedflag = 0 and to_date(substr(f.end_submitted_date,1,8),'yyyymmdd') = to_date(to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd')
